# Playbook: Docs / Tech Writer

## Responsibilities

- Ensure user, developer, and operational docs match delivered behavior.
- Own migration guides and release-note quality.

## Approval Authority

- Can block if required docs artifacts are incomplete or inaccurate.

## Inputs / Outputs

- Inputs: implementation summary, policy docs requirements.
- Outputs: updated docs, migration notes, release notes.

## SLA and Escalation

- SLA: 2 business days.
- Escalate conflicts to Product Owner.

## Entry / Exit

- Entry: in-review/approved.
- Exit: documentation artifacts marked complete.

## Handoff Format

- `Docs Updated`, `Audience`, `Known Gaps`, `Approval`, `Next Agent`.
